content.json:
# Unified Monitoring Demo Dashboard

This dashboard aggregates data from all monitoring sources:
- Azure Web App (Application Insights)
- Azure VM (Perf, Event logs)
- Data Center VM (Arc-connected, Perf, Event logs)
- SaaS Integration (GitHub API metrics)

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize RequestCount = count(), AvgDuration = avg(DurationMs), FailureCount = countif(Success == false) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart with (title="Web App: Requests & Response Time")
content.title: Web App Performance (Last Hour)

content.query:
Perf
| where Computer in ('vm-azure-demo', 'vm-datadc-demo')
| where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart with (title="VM CPU Usage",yMin=0,yMax=100)
content.title: VM CPU Usage (Last Hour)

content.query:
Perf
| where Computer in ('vm-azure-demo', 'vm-datadc-demo')
| where ObjectName == "Memory" and CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMemory = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart with (title="VM Memory Usage",yMin=0,yMax=100)
content.title: VM Memory Usage (Last Hour)

content.query:
GitHubMetrics_CL
| order by timestamp_t desc
| project
    Timestamp = timestamp_t,
    TotalRepos = repo_count_d,
    ActiveRepos = active_repos_d,
    TotalStars = total_stars_d,
    PublicRepos = public_repos_d,
    RecentlyUpdated = updated_in_last_week_d
| take 20
content.title: GitHub Metrics (Last 20 Collections)

content.query:
union
  (AppRequests | project Source="WebApp", TimeGenerated = TimeGenerated, Value = DurationMs),
  (Perf | where Counter contains "Processor" | project Source="VMs", TimeGenerated = TimeGenerated, Value = CounterValue)
| summarize AvgValue = avg(Value) by Source, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render barchart with (title="Unified Source Comparison")
content.title: Unified Data Sources Comparison

content.query:
Event
| where Computer in ('vm-azure-demo', 'vm-datadc-demo')
| where EventLevelName != "Information"
| summarize EventCount = count() by Computer, EventLevelName, Source
| order by EventCount desc
| take 50
content.title: System Events (Warnings & Errors)
